contracts: sequence normalization is deterministic and records every trim
invalid residues and out-of-range VHH lengths are rejected
stable pair IDs are invariant to row order
conflicting duplicate labels are dropped and audited
splits_and_seals: exact VHH-target pairs cannot cross development and formal
formal blinded manifests expose no label column
sealed labels exactly match formal sample IDs
formal input fingerprints are unchanged by unsealing
primary external hTNFa VHHs do not overlap development VHH hashes
embeddings: hash backend supports deterministic CPU unit tests
real backend records model and source hashes
shards resume only when configuration hashes match
VHHBERT is never applied to antigen-only records
antigens longer than the encoder limit use deterministic chunk pooling
training: all variants consume only declared feature blocks
weighted BCE and within-target pair loss are finite
checkpoint selection consults development metrics only
formal labels are inaccessible in train mode
metrics_and_gate: average precision and AUROC match hand-computed fixtures
strongest baseline is selected on development only
gate fails when CI crosses zero or p is not below threshold
gate fails if any seed delta is non-positive
null and shuffled controls cannot produce a deployable decision
candidate_scoring: candidate ID and sequence hashes are preserved
known calibration rows are never converted into training positives
output carries model, data, preregistration, and checkpoint hashes
claim boundary forbids binding or blocking truth
node1 handoff is separate from the canonical V2.5 cascade
final_validation: all declared artifacts exist and match hashes
formal decision agrees with preregistered gate
no formal label is present in training artifacts
project documentation reports both successes and failed gates
